article_en.description: Full article in English (markdown body without frontmatter)

slug.description: URL slug (lowercase, hyphens, no lang suffix)

description_en.description: Meta description EN, under 120 chars, in character voice

image_prompt.description: Image generation prompt describing the scene with Roblox characters

summary_en.description: Factual summary (1-2 paragraphs). Main topic, key facts, games/features mentioned. Used for editorial planning to avoid topic repetition.
